_comment: Merge this agent_skills block into the demo project's .planning/config.json (GSD mode). Keys are the real GSD agent type names in this install — a fork may differ; run /gsd config or list the install's agent types and re-key. Each value is a list of skill directories (each holds a SKILL.md); GSD reads them into the agent at spawn. PATH CONTAINMENT: the gsd-tools agent-skills loader rejects absolute paths ('Absolute paths not allowed') AND resolves junctions/symlinks to their real target then rejects them as outside the project root — both silently inject zero skills. Wire it right: COPY the skill dirs (real copies, not junctions) into <demo>\.claude\skills\dw-demo-* and key the paths project-relative as below. See dw-demo-base/references/orchestrator.md 'The keystone'.
